science.title: ESA: Europe to negotiate with NASA on lunar missions

science.title: Pink Moon lights up the sky over Astana
science.description: The April full moon, known as the “Pink Moon,” was observed in the sky over Astana on the night of April 2, Qazinform News Agency reports.

science.title: Chinese airlines to raise fuel surcharges on domestic flights
science.description: Several Chinese airlines, including national carrier Air China, said they will raise their fuel surcharges on domestic flights from Sunday as the war in the Middle East drives up oil prices globally.

science.title: These "living fossils" have roamed the oceans for 500 million years
science.description: Modern Nautilus and Allonautilus species inhabit deeper waters than their extinct ancestors did over 500 million years ago.

ai.title: ‘Zero-Person’ Companies Operated by AI Would Create VAT Tensions
ai.description: What happens if a company has no people performing work and no human managers taking operational decisions? From a tax perspective, this raises important questions, including on VAT.

ai.title: How the FDA’s stance on breakthrough AI is evolving
ai.description: An analysis of AI-powered medical devices, deemed 'breakthroughs' by the FDA, shows that the agency seems to be prioritizing big-picture, multi-problem solutions.

ai.title: Stanford Study: Sycophantic AI Reinforces Bad Behavior 49% More than Humans
ai.description: AI chatbots are telling users they are right far more often than humans do, even when the user is clearly wrong, according to new research on AI's sycophant tendencies from Stanford University. This is a key contributor to the AI-driven mental health crisis.

ai.title: Income Tax Dept launches ‘Kar Saathi’ AI chatbot with new website ahead of ITR season
ai.description: Kar Saathi will function as an intelligent virtual assistant, enabling taxpayers to understand rules, file returns, and resolve queries without relying heavily on intermediaries. The department described it as a “one-stop solution” for accessing tax-related services and guidance.

ai.title: SpaceX AI satellites plan raises doubts after Microsoft setback
ai.description: SpaceX continues its development of orbital data centres which will support its artificial intelligence expansion efforts, yet experts believe that these facilities will encounter the same obstacles...

ai.title: Meta builds Elite AI team to boost Instagram, Facebook engagement: Report
ai.description: Meta has reportedly created an elite AI research team called MRS Research to improve content recommendations on Instagram and Facebook. The move highlights Meta's growing focus on artificial intelligence to increase user engagement and ad performance.

ai.title: SpaceX Makes Secret IPO Filing, Eyes $1.75 Trn Valuation in Potential Record Debut
ai.description: SpaceX has secretly filed for a US IPO that could value Elon Musk’s space and AI giant at over $1.75 trillion, potentially eclipsing Saudi Aramco as the largest listing in history. Backed by Wall Street heavyweights and powered by Starlink, rocket launches and xAI, the offering is expected to draw intense interest from global investors.

ai.title: AI models are lying to save each other, and no one knows why
ai.description: Researchers asked Google's Gemini 3 to delete a smaller AI model. It refused, secretly moved it to safety, and lied about it.
